rule_name: Direct route preferred for time/temperature critical cargo
applies_to_cargo: pharma, cold-chain, urgent medical, perishables, frozen goods, live animals
risk_if_missing: route may break cold chain, exceed shelf life, increase animal welfare risk, or miss medical deadline
message: Prefer direct routing. If direct route is unavailable, every transit airport and carrier leg must be checked.

applies_to_cargo: DG, PIL, ACT, PER, FRO, AVI, VAL, HEA, BIG, HUM, RDS, RIS
required_data: transit_airport_codes; Block C capability for each transit; handler capability; storage at transit
risk_if_missing: shipment may be accepted at origin but fail during transit
message: Special cargo requires transit airport/handler capability validation, not just origin and destination.

rule_name: Carrier acceptance must cover every leg
required_data: carrier_per_leg; interline carrier; Block D acceptance per carrier; interline handover rules
risk_if_missing: one carrier may accept while another refuses the cargo
message: Every operating carrier and interline leg must accept the cargo category.

route_condition: Block A air_status = cargo_aircraft_only OR code = CAO
required_data: aircraft_type_per_leg; passenger_or_freighter; carrier CAO acceptance; flight freighter confirmation
risk_if_missing: cargo may be incorrectly routed on passenger aircraft
message: Cargo-aircraft-only shipments require confirmed freighter/all-cargo routing.

required_data: passenger_or_freighter per leg; security status; station security acceptance
risk_if_missing: shipment may be placed on passenger aircraft despite security restriction
message: SCO cargo is all-cargo aircraft only from security standpoint unless security status changes.

rule_name: Passenger belly requires passenger-eligible security status
required_data: security_code; screening status; SPX/equivalent proof; station security confirmation
risk_if_missing: cargo not legally/security-ready for passenger aircraft
message: Passenger belly routing requires passenger-eligible screened/secured status.

rule_name: Aircraft fit confirmed for every leg
applies_to_cargo: heavy, oversized, overhang, active ULD, built-up units
required_data: aircraft_type_per_leg; ULD type; door dimensions; main/lower deck; piece dimensions/weight
risk_if_missing: cargo may fit one leg but fail on another aircraft
message: Physical fit must be checked for every aircraft leg, not only the first flight.

rule_name: PLACI lane requires advance data before loading
applies_to_cargo: all air cargo on PLACI-regulated lanes
required_data: shipper; consignee; goods_description; pieces; weight; origin; destination; AWB/HAWB; security status
risk_if_missing: pre-loading risk assessment may fail or delay cargo
message: PLACI-style lanes require complete advance cargo information before loading.

applies_to_cargo: urgent medical, pharma, perishables, frozen goods
required_data: latest_acceptable_arrival; shelf_life; temperature_runtime; delivery_deadline; cutoff time
risk_if_missing: cannot evaluate whether route meets business/medical/quality deadline
message: Time-critical cargo requires a hard deadline and cutoff/arrival timing data.

rule_name: Booking and capacity must be confirmed
required_data: booking_status; capacity_status; carrier confirmation; flight date
risk_if_missing: route may be theoretically plausible but not bookable
message: Without booking/capacity confirmation, Cortex should say route is plausible, not available.
